source_render_method: Chrome headless via CDP local session; runtime DOM and screenshot captured after rendered source markers became available.
source_render_wait_condition: [data-screen] count == 5 and button count >= 6 with __bundler_loading absent/hidden.
previous_v20r_invalid_reason: v20r matched the bundle fallback/thumbnail splash (ARIS centralizado + três pontos) instead of the real rendered source runtime.
exact_visual_contract_from_rendered_sour: The first-access surface now renders the real operator source document inside a full-viewport iframe with zero shell padding, preserving the source layout, typography, copy, controls, animation timing and multi-step structure instead of reimplementing it.
differences_found_against_v20r: v20r showed a minimal static splash; the real source opens on a dark animated stage with skip, next arrow and bottom progress rail.
v20r collapsed the multi-step onboarding into a single interpreted screen; the source contains five runtime screens plus entry CTA.
v20r typography, spacing and control placement diverged from the source render.
changes_applied: Replaced the sandbox first-access visual with a full-screen iframe pointed at /operator_inputs/benchuix/ARIS_Onboarding.html.
Removed shell padding/background differences so the nested source occupies the full viewport.
Bridged source clicks for Começar and pular to the existing localStorage-driven dashboard onboarding state.
Preserved replay behavior from Meu Negócio by clearing the key and reloading the page.
Added local CDP harness artifacts to capture source render, dashboard render, replay proof and responsive evidence.

remaining_visual_delta.png_file_bytes: source and dashboard screenshots serialize to different PNG byte streams, but the decoded pixel matrix is identical.
